records.question: Which browsers named Opera with at least 1.2 market share have been compatible since 2000 with a CProxy accelerator that has a user client and a connection speed of up to 756kbit/s?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE web_client_accelerator.name = 'CProxy' AND web_client_accelerator.connection = 'up to 756kbit/s' AND browser.name = 'Opera' AND browser.market_share >= 1.2 AND accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year = 2000 AND web_client_accelerator.client = 'user'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM browser AS T1 INNER JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.browser_id INNER JOIN Web_client_accelerator AS T3 ON T2.accelerator_id = T3.id WHERE T1.name = 'Opera' AND T1.market_share >= 1.2 AND T2.compatible_since_year >= 2000 AND T3.name = 'CProxy' AND T3.Client = 'user' AND T3.Connection = 'up to 756kbit/s'

records.question: Which browsers are compatible with accelerators used by clients that are exactly End user, ISP?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE web_client_accelerator.client = 'End user, ISP'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T3.id FROM Web_client_accelerator AS T1 INNER JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.accelerator_id INNER JOIN browser AS T3 ON T2.browser_id = T3.id WHERE T1.Client = 'End user, ISP'

records.question: Which browsers became compatible starting exactly in the year 2010?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year = 2010
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.browser_id FROM accelerator_compatible_browser AS T1 WHERE T1.compatible_since_year = 2010

records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser

records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM browser AS T1 INNER JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.browser_id WHERE T1.name = 'Safari' AND T1.market_share >= 8.54 AND T2.compatible_since_year = 2008

records.question: Which browsers named Firefox have a market share of at least 18.11 and have been compatible since exactly 2007?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year = 2007 AND browser.name = 'Firefox' AND browser.market_share >= 18.11

records.question: Which browsers named Opera have a market share of at least 1.2, support CProxy clients with user access and connection up to 756kbit/s, and have been compatible since 2000 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE web_client_accelerator.client = 'user' AND web_client_accelerator.name = 'CProxy' AND browser.name = 'Opera' AND web_client_accelerator.connection = 'up to 756kbit/s' AND accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year <= 2000 AND browser.market_share >= 1.2
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM browser AS T1 INNER JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.browser_id INNER JOIN Web_client_accelerator AS T3 ON T2.accelerator_id = T3.id WHERE T1.name = 'Opera' AND T1.market_share >= 1.2 AND T3.Client = 'CProxy' AND T3.Connection = '756kbit/s' AND T2.compatible_since_year <= 2000
